_comment: Golden Goose Eggs — the 3-5 outcomes that matter most right now. Defined and redefined by theme-review. Orient checks these first. A failing GGE triggers an immediate priority-0 backlog story.

eggs.title: Delivery machine is self-orienting and self-healing
eggs.rationale: The ceremonies loop must decide what to do next without human input, heal SMART failures by splitting, and close sprints cleanly regardless of completion. This is the meta-capability that accelerates everything else.

eggs.title: Living state docs answer 'where are we' without reading history
eggs.rationale: Every agent that touches this repo must be able to orient in under 2 minutes by reading two files. Without this, every session starts with archaeology. Rewritten each sprint by the sync ceremony.

eggs.title: Cluster contract is current, enforced, and machine-checked
eggs.rationale: Sovereignty means nothing if the cluster contract is a document nobody reads. It must be a gate — orient checks it exists and is current, and the bootstrap process references it explicitly. Healthy for 10 consecutive sprints — approaching table stakes, but retained because CLAUDE.md governance section references it as a hard gate for all cluster-level architectural decisions.

eggs.title: Mental model is coherent — one vocabulary, one hierarchy
eggs.rationale: Phase vs increment vs sprint — vocabulary fractures compound into delivery failures. Migration complete: manifest uses 'increments'/'currentIncrement', stories have no standalone phase field, sprint files are increment-N-*.json. The sync ceremony re-checks this each sprint.

indicator.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); assert 'increments' in m, 'increments key missing'; assert 'phases' not in m, 'old phases key still present — vocabulary migration incomplete'; print('vocabulary OK')"

eggs.title: Planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute
eggs.rationale: The plan ceremony cannot run without a pending increment in manifest.json. When all increments complete, the machine stalls silently — no error, no alert, just nothing to plan. This egg catches that stall state immediately. First triggered when increment 9 completed with no successor increment defined.

indicator.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; assert len(pending)>=1, f'No pending increments — plan ceremony will stall. Run theme-review to create one.'; print(f'{len(pending)} pending increment(s) — OK')"
